assertions.assertion: Uses JsonWebTokenHandler.ReadJsonWebToken (or JwtSecurityTokenHandler) to parse the access token string
assertions.rationale: Uses JwtSecurityTokenHandler.ReadJwtToken to parse the token

assertions.assertion: Asserts the client_id claim matches the test client's ID
Asserts the scope claim contains the expected scope value
Asserts the issuer (iss) claim matches the expected authority URL
assertions.rationale: Only asserts issuer is not null, does not match against expected authority URL

assertions.assertion: Does NOT make a network call to validate the token — parses it locally
assertions.rationale: Uses ReadJwtToken for local parsing, no network call
